name: textarea-with-label
visual_summary: A textarea component accompanied by a label for user input. This component is typically used for forms, allowing users to enter multiple lines of text. It's a crucial element for data collection and user feedback.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: textarea-with-label
Description: A textarea component accompanied by a label for user input. This component is typically used for forms, allowing users to enter multiple lines of text. It's a crucial element for data collection and user feedback.
Style: e.g. minimal
Interactions: e.g. hover
Tags: form, input, multiline, text, user-input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
